name: io.github.IDNSIDNS/tenderapi-mcp
description: MCP server for French (BOAMP) + EU (TED) public procurement data via TenderAPI.

environmentVariables.name: TENDERAPI_KEY
environmentVariables.description: TenderAPI key (get a free one at https://tenderapi.fr/). Sent as X-API-Key header on every REST call.

environmentVariables.name: TENDERAPI_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Override the API base URL (default: https://tenderapi.fr). Useful for dev/staging.
